prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约 17311→18532→57633→19496→35484。2023 年出现明显断档（57633），2024 年迅速恢复至 19496，但 2025 年因新高考专业组细分，不限选科专业组（113）最低位次后移至 35484，而物化组（111）最低位次仍为 23609，整体波动较大。近 2 年基准位次约 35484；该校在陕西物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021 年 274 人、2022 年 277 人、2023 年 275 人、2024 年 267 人、2025 年 293 人；2026 年计划 341 人，较 2025 年扩招约 16.4%，计划增幅明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021 年 113→2022 年 113→2023 年 107→2024 年 108→2025 年 103→2026 年 97，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所增加；2022 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（郑强书记管理受学生批评）；抖音热度排名第 63、评价为「一般」，综合热度约 48.9 万，短视频曝光量处于中游水平，无明显报考热度信号。未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中化学工程与技术获评 A-，为该校唯一 A 类学科；与招生专业中的化学工程与工艺、制药工程等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑，但整体优势学科数量较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年专业热度显示：电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类持续高热推荐，与该校工科特色高度匹配，相关专业报考竞争预计加剧；本省物理类考生 2026 年约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争压力上升；太原理工大学位于山西太原，与陕西相邻，地域偏好适中；该校在陕西招生规模较 大（2026 年物理类 341 人），属跨省招生中计划较多的省份，对陕西考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年专业组细分导致的位次后移、2026 年大幅扩招（+16.4%）与物理类考生显著增加（+19.7%）的博弈，以及学校排名上升的正面效应，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 35484 基础上小幅后移，竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约 36971 名，区间 36471–37471 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 17311→18532→57633→19496→35484. In 2023, there was a significant gap (57633), which quickly recovered to 19496 in 2024. However, in 2025, due to the subdivision of major groups under the new college entrance exam, the lowest ranking for the unrestricted subject group (113) shifted back to 35484, while the Chemistry-Physics group (111) remained at 23609, showing overall large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for the past two years is approximately 35484. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category (including Science): 274 in 2021, 277 in 2022, 275 in 2023, 267 in 2024, 293 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 341, an increase of about 16.4% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been steadily rising: 113 in 2021→113 in 2022→107 in 2023→108 in 2024→103 in 2025→97 in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. During the 2022 college entrance exam cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (Secretary Zheng Qiang's management was criticized by students). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, with a rating of 'average', comprehensive popularity around 489,000, and short video exposure at a mid-level, showing no clear signal of application enthusiasm. No records of filing gaps were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A-class discipline at the university. This directly corresponds to majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology and Pharmaceutical Engineering, providing some support for related major applications, but the overall number of advantageous disciplines is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's engineering characteristics, and competition for related majors is expected to intensify. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and increasing competitive pressure. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi, adjacent to Shaanxi, with moderate regional preference. The university's enrollment scale in Shaanxi is relatively large (341 in Physics Category in 2026), making it one of the provinces with more cross-provincial enrollment plans, which is somewhat attractive to Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking shift caused by the subdivision of major groups in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+16.4%), the notable increase in Physics Category candidates (+19.7%), and the positive effect of the university's rising ranking, it is expected that the lowest ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift back from the 2025 baseline of 35484, with competition slightly intensifying. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 36971, with a range of 36471–37471.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 36471–37471, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 36000), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (e.g., after 37000), it is advisable to primarily choose Tier 2 engineering majors to ensure admission probability. The university's Chemical Engineering and Technology (A-) related majors (such as Chemical Engineering and Technology) have outstanding disciplinary strength, making them suitable for candidates interested in the chemical engineering field.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类（含文科）最低位次依次约 3876→3753→14042→6027→4844。2023 年出现明显断档（14042），2024 年恢复至 6027，2025 年进一步前移至 4844，近 2 年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），累计前移约 1183 名；该校在陕西历史类（含文科）招生计划：2021 年 21 人、2022 年 23 人、2023 年 25 人、2024 年 33 人、2025 年 22 人；2026 年计划 24 人，较 2025 年扩招约 9.1%，计划小幅增加。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名持续上升至 2026 年第 97 名，学校综合实力稳步提升，对文科考生也有一定品牌吸引力；2022 年高考周期声誉偏负面（管理争议）；抖音热度一般，无显著正面或负面舆情信号；未见投档断档记录；化学工程与技术 A-，与历史类招生专业（法学、会计学、英语等）无直接学科映射，优势学科对文科专业报考的拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年专业热度显示：法学分化观望（考公优势但竞争激烈）、会计学推荐（就业稳定）、汉语言/中文推荐（考公热门）；本省历史类考生 2026 年约 88500 人，较 2025 年 75641 人增加约 17.0%，考生规模扩大，竞争压力上升；太原理工大学位于山西太原，与陕西相邻，跨省就读接受度较高；该校在陕西历史类招 生规模较小（2026 年 24 人），属于该校文科招生的外省补充。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次前移趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（+9.1%）与历史类考生显著增加（+17.0%）的博弈，考生增幅大于计划增幅，竞争预计加剧，位次将小幅后移；预测最低位次约 5258 名，区间 4758–5758 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 3876, 3753, 14042, 6027, and 4844 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant gap (14042), which recovered to 6027 in 2024, and further advanced to 4844 in 2025, showing a continuous upward trend over the past two years (decreasing ranking numbers indicate increased competition), with a cumulative advance of about 1183 places. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi's History Category (including Liberal Arts) was: 21 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 22 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 24, an increase of about 9.1% compared to 2025, a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been rising to 97th in 2026, indicating steady improvement in overall strength, which also has some brand appeal for liberal arts candidates. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was somewhat negative (management controversies). Douyin popularity is average, with no significant positive or negative public opinion signals. No record of admission gaps was observed. Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A-, but it has no direct disciplinary mapping to History Category majors (such as Law, Accounting, English, etc.), so the pull effect of advantageous disciplines on liberal arts major applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: Law is polarized and wait-and-see (civil service exam advantages but fierce competition), Accounting is recommended (stable employment), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended (popular for civil service exams). The number of History Category candidates in this province in 2026 is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% from 75,641 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool and increasing competitive pressure. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi, adjacent to Shaanxi, with high acceptance for cross-province study. The university's History Category enrollment in Shaanxi is small (24 in 2026), serving as a supplementary source for its liberal arts admissions from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in rankings in 2025, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+9.1%), and the significant increase in History Category candidates (+17.0%), the growth in candidates outpaces the plan increase, so competition is expected to intensify, and rankings will slightly decline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5258, with a range of 4758 to 5758.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 4700), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors like Law and Accounting. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (e.g., after 5700), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.
